description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On December 16, 2024 at 1:58 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on Toland Street at Jerrold Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northeast on Toland Street. As the Waymo AV approached the intersection with Jerrold Avenue, a heavy 
truck initiated a wide left turn from southwest Toland Street onto southeast Jerrold Avenue. The Waymo AV came to a stop at the four-way 
stop sign to prepare to cross the intersection with Jerrold Avenue. While the heavy truck was partially on Toland Street and partially on 
Jerrold Avenue, the Waymo AV entered the intersection to maneuver around the right side of the heavy truck, but immediately came to a 
stop as the heavy truck began reversing. The passenger side of the heavy truck then made contact with the passenger side of the Waymo 
AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
